title: Uncropped blots corresponding to Figures 3B and S1A in "Restrictor slows early transcription elongation to render RNA polymerase II susceptible to termination at non-coding RNA loci" (Mimoso et al, 2025)
author: Vlaming, Hanneke
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These files contain the uncropped Western blot images corresponding to panels 3B and S1A of the manuscript "Restrictor slows early transcription elongation to render RNA polymerase II susceptible to termination at non-coding RNA loci" by Mimoso and Vlaming et al, 2025. 
 Each file is provided as a PDF, with annotated versions of the blots (luminescence only or merged with the ladder image).For reference, the preprint version is available at:  https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.01.08.631787v1.  
 File descriptions: - *Mimoso-Vlaming-2025_Figure3B_uncroppedblots.pdf*: Source data for Figure 3B - *Mimoso-Vlaming-2025_FigureS1A_uncroppedblots.pdf*: Source data for Supplementary Figure S1A
